  • Constructor Details

    • ProverCall

  • Method Details

    • cleanup

      public void cleanup()
      Description copied from class: AbstractXProverCall
      Cleans up this prover call. This is the place to put any code that does some clean up. For instance, a client could put here the code to delete any intermediate file that was created by this prover call.

      This method will always be called after the task running run() has been canceled. However, as task synchronization is only done cooperatively in Java, there is no guarantee that method run() has actually finished execution when this method is called.

      Specified by:
      cleanup in class AbstractXProverCall

    • displayMessage

      public String displayMessage()
      Description copied from class: AbstractXProverCall
      Returns the human-readable message that will be displayed for this proof.

      This method is called only when AbstractXProverCall.isValid() returned true.

      Specified by:
      displayMessage in class AbstractXProverCall
      Returns:
      the message to display for this proof

    • isValid

      public boolean isValid()
      Description copied from class: AbstractXProverCall
      Tells whether the sequent passed to the constructor has been proved valid by the external prover.

      This method and AbstractXProverCall.run() may be called concurrently. Implementors should not make any assumption on the respective call orders of these two methods.

      Specified by:
      isValid in class AbstractXProverCall
      Returns:
      true if the sequent to prove is valid

    • run

      public void run()
      Description copied from class: AbstractXProverCall
      Run the external prover on the sequent given at instance creation.

      Implementors of this method must take great care to check very often for cancellation using AbstractXProverCall.isCancelled() and to respond to thread interruption in a timely manner. If either cancellation or interruption has been requested, this method shall return as soon as possible.

      Specified by:
      run in interface Runnable
      Specified by:
      run in class AbstractXProverCall
